title: The Old Course
short_description: Official St Andrews Links golf sim for iOS — top-down touch-and-swipe play on the Home of Golf.
description:
St Andrews Links presents The Old Course, an official licensed product from The Home of Golf.

With unique top down touch-and-swipe controls, beautiful graphics and addictive game-play, The Old Course is easily played and enjoyed by anyone. The game of Golf has never looked or played better!
